reference: The initial cause of the stiffness is neurological; however, the residual effects may be due to soft tissue contracture. You will need a trained physiotherapist to help address this. Muscles are likely to atrophy if they are not given adequate exercise.
text: The initial cause of the stiffness is neurological; however, the residual effects may be due to soft tissue contracture. You will need a trained physiotherapist to help address this. Muscles are likely to atrophy if they are not. Adequate exercise.
